ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director(s) of the movie */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer(s) of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) in which the movie was produced */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or promotional slogan of the movie */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Age rating or certification of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie produced by the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the production company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the production company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the production company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the production company */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the production company */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Runtime of the movie in minutes
Number of votes for the movie
Country where the movie was produced
Language(s) in which the movie was produced
Tagline or promotional slogan of the movie
Age rating or certification of the movie
Unique identifier for each production company
ID of the movie produced by the company
Headquarters location of the production company
Date when the production company was founded
Name of the CEO of the production company
Official website of the production company
Number of employees in the production company
Annual revenue of the production company
Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp of the user's last login
